governanceUpdateNote: On 2026-07-19 the repository owner explicitly authorized governance-only direct-main documentation updates so roadmap PR numbering remains intact. Future substantial changes still use focused pull requests.

currentBatch.extensionRule: Use PR 29 and 30 only after PR 23-28 are merged, CI is stable, and inventory/production contracts are settled.

deliveredCapabilities: GitHub Actions CI and GitHub Pages deployment
deterministic simulation commands, events, clock, replay and checksum
IndexedDB persistence core and versioned save envelopes
runtime checksum-validated autosave and automatic restore
manual save slots and JSON import/export
autosave snapshot rotation, diagnostics and recovery
three planet domains: resource, industry and military
save schema v2 migration from the former four-zone model
resource economy with energy, population, stability and storage
planet UI v2 with separate Research, Shipyard, Defense and Fleet routes
P0 visual shell and P1 Aegis vertical-slice assets
persistent six-PR delivery and AI handoff protocol
knownLimitations: research catalog, research queue and technology effects are not implemented
ship and defense inventories and production queues are not implemented
fleets, flights, missions, combat and autonomous bots are not implemented
the current production content is only the first Aegis vertical slice
public Pages deployment should be checked after material UI batches
